checks.description: Ensure that the ready signal (rdy) is never asserted before the counter reaches 16 cycles.
checks.pass_condition: rdy must remain 0 for any observation window where the internal counter (inferred) is less than 16 cycles after reset release.
checks.trigger_condition: When a legal multiplication operation is started after reset.

checks.description: Verify that after a single multiplication operation the product output (p) eventually reflects the arithmetic result of a * b when rdy becomes 1.
checks.pass_condition: When rdy transitions to 1, p must hold a value consistent with the 16-bit multiplication of the last driven a and b values; the exact cycle is not required.
checks.trigger_condition: After driving a and b for a legal operation.
